hooks.command: [ -f wiki/hot.md ] && echo '=== HOT CACHE ===' && cat wiki/hot.md && echo '=== END HOT CACHE ===' || true

hooks.prompt: If wiki/hot.md exists in the current directory, silently read it to restore recent context. Do not announce this.

hooks.command: [ -f wiki/hot.md ] && echo '=== POST-COMPACT: reloading hot cache ===' && cat wiki/hot.md || true

hooks.prompt: Hook-injected context does not survive context compaction. If wiki/hot.md exists, silently re-read it to restore context. Do not announce this.

hooks.command: [ -d .git ] || exit 0; git add -- skills/ scripts/ tests/ Makefile hooks/hooks.json 2>/dev/null; (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "chore: auto-commit $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" 2>/dev/null) || true

cd "$PWD" && [ -d wiki ] && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^wiki/' && echo 'WIKI_CHANGED: wiki was modified this session. Update wiki/hot.md with a brief summary (under 500 words). Use format: Last Updated, Key Recent Facts, Recent Changes, Active Threads. Keep it factual. Overwrite the file completely.' || true

hooks.prompt: If wiki was modified, update wiki/hot.md before finishing. Include: what was created/modified, key decisions, next steps. Keep it under 500 words. Overwrite completely.
